scripts.test:all: concurrently "cargo test -p mlt-server -p mlt-server-bin" "turbo run test"
scripts.cap:open:android: pnpm --filter @my-little-todo/mobile exec npx cap open android
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n rust,vite -c blue,green "cargo run -p mlt-server-bin" "pnpm --filter @my-little-todo/web dev:vite"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @my-little-todo/core exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @my-little-todo/plugin-sdk exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @my-little-todo/web exec tsc -b --noEmit
